title: Achamillai Achamillai Maname Song Lyrics Bagavathi
stanzas:
achamillai achamillai manamae
vetriyellaam ini ivan vasamae
mothaathae!
ivannidam mothaathae!

achamillai achamillai manamae
vetriyellaam ini ivan vasamae

ivan nadakkum
dhisaiyae kilakkaiy maaruthu
edukkum mudivae
theerppaai airuthu

ivan ezhunthaal
idiyin mulakkam kaetkuthu
nadanthaal ethirikkum
bayathaal vaerkutthu

siru ulithaan malaiyai
thagarthu kaattudhu.
thulaiyitta piragae
moongil isaikkuthu.

achamillai achamillai manamae
vetriyellaam ini ivan vasamae
mothaatha!
thuninthavan vaaraandaa!
mothaathae!
ivannidam mothaathae!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Bagavathi?

The lead actor in the movie is Vijay.

What is the theme of the song Achamillai Achamillai?

The song emphasizes courage and determination, inspiring listeners to face challenges fearlessly.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by Deva, a renowned music director in Tamil cinema.

What year was the movie Bagavathi released?

The movie was released in the year 2002.

Who performed the vocals for the song?

The song was sung by the talented playback singer Shankar Mahadevan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Achamillai Achamillai from the 2002 Tamil movie Bagavathi, starring Vijay and Reemma Sen, is a motivational anthem composed by Deva and sung by Shankar Mahadevan. It portrays themes of courage and determination, encouraging listeners to overcome obstacles. The energetic beats and powerful lyrics make it a standout track in Tamil cinema. This song resonates with anyone seeking inspiration and strength in challenging times.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Achamillai Achamillai, a powerful and motivational track from the movie Bagavathi, showcases the dynamic collaboration between Shankar Mahadevan's robust vocals and Deva's inspiring composition. This song, featuring Vijay in the lead role, resonates with themes of courage and determination. Its energetic beats and uplifting lyrics make it a timeless anthem for overcoming challenges.
